title: neanotis boerhavioides
intro: Neanotis boerhavioides, also known as Boerhavia or Pusa, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Nyctaginaceae, commonly found in the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Neanotis boerhavioides include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve kidney function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
